title: Unbounded memory growth in _latencies_us list
description:
## Location
python/src/lichen/sim/metrics.py:148

## Description
Every successful packet delivery appends its latency to _latencies_us. This list grows without bound for the duration of the simulation. The latency_stats() method recomputes min/max/mean from the full list every time, which becomes increasingly expensive as the list grows.

## Failure Scenario
Simulation runs for hours with thousands of successful deliveries per second. The _latencies_us list grows to hundreds of millions of entries, consuming GB of memory. Additionally, each call to latency_stats() or snapshot() becomes O(n) expensive, degrading API response times.

## Category
safety
